title: bidens microcephala
intro: Bidens microcephala, also known as Small-headed Beggar-ticks or Small-headed Bidens, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Bidens microcephala has been used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of essential oils, flavonoids, and saponins. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its reported health benefits, including wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from digestive issues. Bidens microcephala is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may also be used in traditional remedies, such as salves or poultices, to treat skin conditions and other health problems.
